app.name: WAKI
home.nudge: Nè mèkpɔ alẽ si nèle egbea o. Alẽ ke nèle?
home.quote: Nèle nu wɔm nyuie wu alẽ si nèbu.
consent.title: Hafi míadze egɔme
consent.noticeCompanion: WAKI nye xɔlɔ̃ si aɖo alɔ̃ nè, menye dɔkta alo therapist o.
consent.noticePrivacy: Wò data anɔ wò fon sia dzi — nudeke mayi afisiafimea o.
consent.noticeCrisis: Ne xɔyiyi le eme la, app la afia emergency contacts nè ɣesiaɣi.
consent.toggleLocal: Dzra mood data ɖi le fon sia dzi
consent.toggleLocalHint: Ehiã na check-in, mood tracking, kple nyaƒoƒo ƒe ŋkɔ.
consent.toggleTrain: Kpɔ dzi na WAKI ɖo nyuie
consent.toggleTrainHint: Ma usage nyawo si wotso ŋkɔ le eme (menye wò nyaƒoƒo alo wò ŋutɔ ƒe nyawo o).
consent.toggleCloudHint: Ne èdi la. Dzra wò data ɖi le cloud dzi be nàte ŋu akpɔe le fon yeye dzi.
firstCheckin.title: Alẽ ke nèle fifia?
firstCheckin.subtitle: Mía dze egɔme kple check-in kpuie ɖeka. Tia nusẽnuẽ si sɔ kple alẽ si nèle.
onboarding.languageSubtitle: {{roster}}. Tap the one you want to use — you can change this later in your profile.
onboarding.nicknameTitle: Ŋkɔ ka míate ŋu awɔ wò?
onboarding.nicknameSubtitle: Ŋkɔ sia ado ɖe wò fon sia dzi ko.
checkin.title: Alẽ ke nèle?
checkin.subtitle: Tia nusẽnuẽ si sɔ kple wò mɔnu fifia.
checkin.followUpLabel: Nèdi be nàtsɔ nu akã ɖe eŋu? (ne èdi la)
checkin.savedBody: Akpe na wò be nètsɔ ɣeyiɣi kpɔ wò ŋutɔ.
conversation.safeguard: WAKI menye dɔkta alo crisis service o. Ne kpekpeɖeŋu le eme la, yɔ 999.
crisis.title: Nèle dedie fifia?
crisis.headline: Nèmele ɖekae o.
crisis.barText: Ne nàle fu ɖim la, kpɔɖeŋu li.
crisis.nearbyHelp: Kpɔɖeŋu a le ɖe ke ŋu
crisis.footer: WAKI menye crisis service o. Ne kpekpeɖeŋu le eme la, yɔ emergency services.
toolkit.title: Dɔwɔnu awo
toolkit.subtitle: Dɔwɔwɔ siwo aɖo alɔ̃ nè be wò dzi nàlɔ̃.
profile.localData: Wò data le wò fon sia dzi
profile.sessionBody: Ɖo session la na be nàtrɔ yi onboarding.
profile.logoutBody: Esia atutui wò session eye nàtrɔ ayi onboarding dzi.
settings.title: Ɖoɖowo
settings.privacyTrain: Nyawo si wotso ŋkɔ le eme
settings.notifications: Ŋkeke sia ŋkeke ƒe check-in nɔnɔme
settings.notificationHint: Xɔ ɖoɖo blewu be nàkpɔ wò ŋutɔ ŋkeke sia ŋkeke
settings.dataExportHint: Download wò mood ŋkɔ kple sessions
settings.exportFallback: Sharing meli le device sia dzi o. Wowɔ wò export le: {{path}}
settings.exportFailed: Míete ŋu aɖe wò data tɔ fifia o.
settings.restoreDataHint: Tia WAKI backup file le device sia dzi
settings.restoreFailed: Míete ŋu agbugbɔ backup file ma o.
settings.deleteAllBody: Esia atutui wò mood check-in, nyaƒoƒo, kple ɖoɖowo katã tegbee. Nàte ŋu akpɔe ake o.
learn.title: Srɔ̃
learn.subtitle: Se wò tamedze gɔme. Nyagɔmese ɖeka le ɣeyiɣi ɖeka me.
stories.title: Gbeƒãɖeɖewo
stories.subtitle: Amewo ƒe nuxɔamesiwo sɔ kple wò tɔ.
offline.banner: Nèmele internet dzi o. Nu aɖewo mate ŋu awɔ dɔ o.
permission.micBody: WAKI hiã microphone na gbegbɔgblɔ ƒe nyaƒoƒo.
safeguard.statement: WAKI menye dɔkta, therapist, alo crisis service o. Ne kpekpeɖeŋu le eme la, yɔ 999.
